---

**Methodology.** Scores = mean of `theme_weight × FinBERT_sentiment × (credibility × tier_boost)` across all (article, matched theme, asset) triples. Theme weights are defined in `src/impact/asset_map.py`. Score ∈ [−1, +1]; |score| ≥ 0.45 ⇒ STRONG, ≥ 0.20 ⇒ MODERATE, ≥ 0.08 ⇒ MILD, else FLAT.
